sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nuntakna khomun kei, Hong pia'n Topa,
Galile tuili gei, Na hih bangmah
Ka lungsim vah zo kei, Lai simna tawh;
Nangmah tak ka lung deih, Hin na thu aw.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Thuman thutak hong pia'n, Ka Topa aw,
Khomun Na piak bang zia'n, Na thupha tawh;
Tua hi leh kol teng kia'n, Ka suak ta ding
Thu man in hong khai khien ka lung ngam ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kei ading, Topa, Nang, Nuntak khomun;
Keimah ka suahtak na'ng, Nangma Thugun;
Nong vaak ding hi; Hong it sak in thuman, Itna na hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa aw, Kha siangtho, Kei hong puak in,
Keima mit khua mu lo, Vaak sak dingin;
Na thu thuk Laisiangtho, Hong tel sak ding,
Na Thu sung pan Nang, ko, Hong mu sak ding.
